context7.description: Live documentation lookup for libraries, frameworks, and APIs.

supabase.description: Supabase database and project operations. Replace YOUR_PROJECT_REF before enabling.

sequential-thinking.description: Step-by-step reasoning support for decomposition, planning, and debugging.

playwright.description: Browser automation and E2E verification via Playwright.

_comments.usage: Copy only the servers you need into your runtime MCP config such as .mcp.json or ~/.claude.json.
_comments.placeholders: Replace YOUR_PROJECT_REF and add any runtime-specific credentials before enabling a server.
_comments.context_budget: Keep enabled MCPs minimal for the current task so they do not crowd the context window.
